meaning: System may be near a capacity limit threshold or warning condition
recommended_response: Escalate review and examine threshold drivers

meaning: Dashboard may hide unequal exposure or recovery burden
recommended_response: Disaggregate data and include affected communities

meaning: Dashboard confidence is limited by incomplete or low-quality evidence
recommended_response: Label uncertainty and improve monitoring coverage

meaning: System may lack slack redundancy or reserves
recommended_response: Review backup capacity and common-mode failure

meaning: System may be unable to revise decisions under changing conditions
recommended_response: Review governance flexibility learning and implementation
